_comment: Provenance ledger for every asset input (validate.mjs enforces the license literals). OWNED = authored in this repo by the deterministic generators; provenance points at the recipe + generator that produce it, so a clean clone can re-derive every byte. The CC0 mechanism (url + sha256) is retained for the future audio beds -- attribution UI conflicts with the no-external-links-for-kids invariant, so CC0/OWNED stay the only licenses that can pass CI. Add an entry BEFORE referencing a new source id from assets.json.

sources.name: Generated biome-scene backdrops (author/generate_backdrops.mjs)
sources.notes: Deterministic, seeded (author/lib/rand.mjs); no external input. ADR 0012 addendum full-bleed scene bands.
